questions.question: Which therapists & mental health in Seattle Wa are open on weekends?
questions.answer: Therapists & Mental Health in Seattle Wa with weekend hours include: The Center for Psychological Health (Sat: 08:00-15:00), LightHeart Associates (Sat: "by appointment"), Planned Parenthood (Sat: 08:30-16:30), Mindful Therapy Group (Sat: 08:30-17:00), WW Studio (Sat: 07:00-10:00). 5 total with weekend availability.
